title: Classify soils
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Classify soils demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare to classify soil samples

pcs.text: Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of soil classification and client’s information needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of soil classification and client’s information needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of soil classification and client’s information needs.

pcs.text: Identify any hazards and relevant safe work procedures associated with the types of site samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify any hazards and relevant safe work procedures associated with the types of site samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify any hazards and relevant safe work procedures associated with the types of site samples.

pcs.text: Inspect supplied samples and test data, compare with specifications and record and report any discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect supplied samples and test data, compare with specifications and record and report any discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect supplied samples and test data, compare with specifications and record and report any discrepancies.

pcs.text: Liaise with client when supplied samples, test data and/or job request forms do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client when supplied samples, test data and/or job request forms do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client when supplied samples, test data and/or job request forms do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems.

pcs.text: Assemble required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to classify soil samples

elements.title: Examine properties of soil samples

pcs.text: Assess appearance and feel of soil to determine moisture condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess appearance and feel of soil to determine moisture condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess appearance and feel of soil to determine moisture condition.

pcs.text: Use moulding/indentation tests, penetrometer and/or density index data to determine soil consistency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use moulding/indentation tests, penetrometer and/or density index data to determine soil consistency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use moulding/indentation tests, penetrometer and/or density index data to determine soil consistency.

pcs.text: Identify the soil’s major, secondary and minor components and the proportion of each
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the soil’s major, secondary and minor components and the proportion of each?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the soil’s major, secondary and minor components and the proportion of each.

pcs.text: Assign a soil colour based on own observations and review of field log sheets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign a soil colour based on own observations and review of field log sheets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign a soil colour based on own observations and review of field log sheets.

pcs.text: Determine soil structure based on own observations and review of available zoning, defect and cementing data recorded for undisturbed field samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil structure based on own observations and review of available zoning, defect and cementing data recorded for undisturbed field samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil structure based on own observations and review of available zoning, defect and cementing data recorded for undisturbed field samples.

pcs.text: Review any additional observations and test data that may identify soil origin
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review any additional observations and test data that may identify soil origin?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review any additional observations and test data that may identify soil origin.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Examine properties of soil samples

elements.title: Analyse available test results

pcs.text: Compare supplied mechanical test data with standard classification values for different soil types
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare supplied mechanical test data with standard classification values for different soil types?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare supplied mechanical test data with standard classification values for different soil types.

pcs.text: Compare particle size and percentage composition data with standard classification values for different soil types
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare particle size and percentage composition data with standard classification values for different soil types?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare particle size and percentage composition data with standard classification values for different soil types.

pcs.text: Compare other laboratory test results with own observations to confirm assignment of plasticity, grading and strength of soil samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare other laboratory test results with own observations to confirm assignment of plasticity, grading and strength of soil samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare other laboratory test results with own observations to confirm assignment of plasticity, grading and strength of soil samples.

pcs.text: Recognise anomalies or unexpected results and, if necessary, recheck specimens and test results and conduct repeat tests to ensure reliable results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise anomalies or unexpected results and, if necessary, recheck specimens and test results and conduct repeat tests to ensure reliable results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise anomalies or unexpected results and, if necessary, recheck specimens and test results and conduct repeat tests to ensure reliable results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Analyse available test results

elements.title: Record soil classification

pcs.text: Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid soil classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid soil classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid soil classification.

pcs.text: Record and store client’s soil classification, samples and test data in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and store client’s soil classification, samples and test data in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and store client’s soil classification, samples and test data in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain confidentiality of client information in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain confidentiality of client information in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain confidentiality of client information in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use safe work procedures and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe work procedures and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other personnel.

pcs.text: Clean work area and collect, recycle or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean work area and collect, recycle or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work area and collect, recycle or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and check serviceability of test equipment before storage.
